hero.title:

blooms the essence
hero.desc: Acura Aroma distils Tunisian plants into pure floral waters and essential oils, crafted for cosmetic brands, wellness and aromatherapy worldwide.

about.title: Expertise rooted in the land
about.desc: Born from a passion for Tunisian botany, Acura Aroma is an artisan distillery dedicated to the pure and respectful extraction of medicinal and aromatic plants.
about.step1_desc: We cultivate and source our plants locally, favouring organic farming and endemic Tunisian varieties with high aromatic value.
about.step2_desc: Our copper alembic ensures gentle extraction that preserves all the active principles and natural fragrances of each plant.
about.step3_desc: Each batch is analysed, filtered and packaged in amber glass bottles to preserve its purity to the destination.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.desc: Individual, distributor or brand — contact us for a personalised, no-commitment quote.
contact.success_msg: Thank you. We will reply within 24 hours.

footer.desc: Tunisian artisan distillery specialised in producing 100% natural floral waters and essential oils.

process.title: Our artisan process
process.desc: Each step is carefully mastered to deliver an essence of exceptional purity.
process.s1_desc: Plants grown locally or sourced from certified organic partner farmers in Tunisia.
process.s2_desc: Traditional copper alembic. Slow, low-temperature distillation preserving all aromatic molecules.
process.s3_desc: Each batch undergoes testing guaranteeing the purity and conformity of the final product.
process.s4_desc: Airtight amber glass bottles, professional labelling, eco-friendly packaging. Ready for international export.
